title: Puerto Banus Yacht Hire: Costs, Seasons & Boat Choices for 2026
html:
Puerto Banus, the glamorous marina on Spain's Costa del Sol, is a top destination for yacht hire. With prices starting from €400 for a half-day tour, you can explore the Mediterranean in style. BoatHire24 connects you directly with verified owners, making booking straightforward and reliable.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Your voyage can start from Puerto Banus Marina itself, a renowned hub lined with superyachts. Nearby, Marbella Harbour offers a more intimate departure, while the beaches of San Pedro de Alcántara provide a relaxed launch point. For day trips, head east to Cabopino Marina or west to Estepona Marina. The Bay of Marbella and the iconic La Concha mountain provide a stunning backdrop.

How much does it cost to rent a yacht in Puerto Banus?

Prices vary widely, from €400 for a shared tour to over €10,000 per day for a crewed superyacht. Budget-conscious travellers can join a group excursion on a motorboat for around €80 per person. For a private experience, a small motorboat for half a day starts at €600, while a catamaran full-day charter with up to 12 guests costs from €1,500. A fully crewed luxury yacht typically runs from €3,500 upwards. To see the full range and compare verified boat listings, visit BoatHire24.

  • Shared tour: from €80 per person, half-day
  • Small motorboat (private, half-day): from €600
  • Catamaran (full-day, up to 12 guests): from €1,500
  • Crewed luxury yacht (full-day, up to 8 guests): from €3,500

Which boat to rent in Puerto Banus

  1. Motorboat, Ideal for fast trips to Marbella or Cabopino; up to 8 guests; from €600 half-day.
  2. Catamaran, Stable and spacious for family days on the water; up to 12 guests; from €1,500 full-day.
  3. Sailing yacht, Perfect for a relaxed cruise along the coast; up to 10 guests; from €1,200 full-day.
  4. Luxury motor yacht, For those seeking a premium experience with crew; up to 8 guests; from €3,500 full-day. An example is the Maiora 26m for hire, which offers exceptional comfort.
  5. RIB / Tender, Great for watersports or exploring the coastline; up to 6 guests; from €400 half-day.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

For most smaller boats and guided trips, no licence is required; the operator will provide a skipper. If you wish to drive a boat yourself, a valid International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or a Spanish nautical licence is typically needed. The exact requirements depend on boat power and distance from shore, so the operator will confirm your specific needs.

Visit the marina early in the morning to secure a berth and watch the superyachts arrive; the best local wind for a sailing trip is the Levante, which picks up in July and August.

How far can I travel in a day from Puerto Banus?

With a full-day charter, you can easily reach Gibraltar, about 30 nautical miles west, or explore the coast toward Málaga, 25 nautical miles east.

What is the best month to rent a yacht in Puerto Banus?

The high season runs from June to September, with July and August offering the warmest weather and calmest seas. May and October also provide pleasant conditions with fewer crowds.

Can I cancel my booking?

Cancellation policies vary by operator, so check the listing details. For general questions, refer to the booking FAQ on BoatHire24.

At a glance

  • Price band: €80, €10,000+ per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Boat types: Motorboats, catamarans, sailing yachts, luxury motor yachts, RIBs

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

What is included in the charter price?

Most prices include the boat, crew, fuel, and insurance; food and drinks are often extra.

Can I bring my own food and drink?

Yes, most operators allow you to bring your own supplies, but confirm when booking.

Is it safe to swim in the sea off Puerto Banus?

Yes, the waters are generally calm and clean, with many beaches along the coast.

How do I pay for a charter?

Payment is made securely through the BoatHire24 platform, with full booking protection.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. If you own a boat, consider reaching out to rent out your boat through our platform and connect with thousands of travellers planning their 2026 holidays.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
